textByHash.0891db8eaab4f60fba78a54c2c949a0ce4056dba: No, human. This isn't designed for your race, it could have unforeseen consequences.
textByHash.12a519712b9955f174777f837d828715c5d74657: Don't distract me! This formula is highly volatile!
textByHash.1b4ff156e6e74fc0df029cb7f6e7b6a86c9bf5a7: No, you don't. Your predecessor didn't want to help us. Perhaps you remember what came of him?
textByHash.359ed45444a02367de900a8777ae32dd43146175: Did you really need to come here to tell me that?
textByHash.5bdc196839983921d7bf93262e7b5efbcc8bdf44: Wise choice. Now please, I'm working a deadline here.
textByHash.64e82f8bda1190d66c9652d7aca4fa2ec630589c: I see. Then you know that I can't let you leave this place alive.
textByHash.654add6a8966234ee185c7da98855b6cebe81a86: How much did you hear, human?
textByHash.77d5ce41086cd5566ccca12d57bab4e1ad7269ad: Yes! The ones that built the place, the Sisterhood, they called it the Elixir of Everlasting.
textByHash.815923e56c2dbc2d367184152e7985268d801ce7: So someone's been snooping around asking questions, and you decided to come here? What if they followed you?
textByHash.8ee584bd74cff97c7cfd7c2a3672bfa2953012ed: Go back to your pub Carl. I'll have more Bloody Bracer sent over soon. In the meantime, try to be a bit smarter.
textByHash.9d8073905ba28eb0987470942989d2b2fa61f089: A joker? Your arrogance will be your end, human.
textByHash.ac44fe8627c3ca213cb41b4d43fb249f5c29dc37: We hide it in their beer, Bloody Bracer. They've no idea what it's really doing to them!
textByHash.c77a5c458fa1755d92c1a35a448f475ba015d9a2: It was hidden deep within the sanctuary here. A recipe, for an elixir.
textByHash.defa898db04c6c2f36299c5e065f84cba3ea52e7: You're a fool Carl. If you're not careful, you'll jeopardise everything.
textByHash.f17179cf15298e2046eb75ba7a60e730f1081b92: Ugh, look around you, what does it look like?
